seed_instruction: Write a professional email that you could send to ask your boss for a raise.
org_constraint: All sentences should be written in lowercase.
new_constraint: The email should be written in sentence case.
instruction: Write a professional email that you could send to ask your boss for a raise. All sentences should be written in lowercase. The email should be written in sentence case.
response:
subject: salary discussion request

dear [boss's name],

i hope this email finds you well.

i am writing to formally request a review of my current salary. over the past [time period, e.g., year], i have taken on increased responsibilities and consistently exceeded expectations in my role as [your job title]. for example, i successfully managed [mention a specific achievement or project] which resulted in [quantifiable positive outcome].

i have also taken the initiative to develop [mention a skill or area of growth], which has directly benefited the team and our department's goals. i am very committed to [company name] and excited about my future contributions here.

i believe my performance and the current market value for my role warrant an increase in my compensation. i would appreciate the opportunity to meet with you at your convenience to discuss my salary and career progression in more detail.

thank you for your time and consideration.

best regards,

[your name]<turn|>
